data.name: Wonder Catgirl XXX
data.detailed_description:
Your girlfriend won’t let you try three fingers? Good news: this one’s a three-button banger—use your three fingers to unlock our six-fingered Catgirls Superheroes.

If that’s not a great deal, what is?

Wonder Catgirl XXX is a snappy arcade micro-challenge: watch the on-screen cues, slam three buttons at the right moments, clear the stage, and unlock a fresh superhero catgirl (kemonomimi) video scene.
No lore. No dialogs. No grind.
Just play → hit the cues → unlock the scene—with 100+ scenes to collect so it’s anything but small.

🐱 Highlights

  • Three-Button Banger: crisp visual prompts; fast, satisfying clears

  • 100+ unlockable scenes: a big vault of superhero catgirl rewards

  • Instant restarts: short stages, quick retries, constant dopamine

  • Lightweight & fast: no bloat, straight to the blushes

  • Original heroines: superhero-inspired catgirls (not affiliated with existing IP)

Wonder Catgirl XXX is unapologetic, digital stimulation. Boot it, bang the buttons, enjoy the view.

data.short_description: A three-button banger where landing the cues unlocks 100+ superhero catgirl adult videos. Fast arcade, zero fluff.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
